---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(moderndive)
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2020-04-21')
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load(2020, week = 17)
```


## import database


```{r}
```
